title: Confidence field in materialized state and draft gate in ready queue
definition_of_done: draft nodes excluded from trls ready; verified nodes appear normally; existing nodes without confidence field default to verified; tests pass; make check green
outcome: Added confidence field to op Payload and materialized Issue; draft gate in ComputeReady excludes draft nodes; existing nodes without confidence default to verified; --confidence flag on trls create; 9 new tests (unit + integration); make check green
